General.Name: DeepMarkit Corp.
General.Description: Prospect Prediction Markets Inc. operates a sports-focused prediction market and fan engagement platform. Its platform enables fans to participate in transparent, real-time prediction markets across various sports, and provides enriched, data-driven experiences that deepen engagement before, during, and after games. Prospect Prediction Markets Inc. has collaboration with ASAPI.AI to explore the development of machine learning-based models designed to predict event outcomes relevant to prediction markets. The company was formerly known as DeepMarkit Corp. and changed its name to Prospect Prediction Markets Inc. in February 2026. Prospect Prediction Markets Inc. was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
General.Address: #503 - 905 West Pender St., Vancouver, BC, Canada, V6C 1L6
